summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bookvia Admin Permissions feature. All 10 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. The 8 new permissions (4 visibility + 4 profile editing) are correctly implemented and working.

minor.issue: Legacy 'edit_profile' permission still exists in old workers' data (not removed during migration)

passed_tests: Backend: Owner login (POST /api/auth/business/login) - PASSED
Backend: Owner dashboard access (GET /api/businesses/me/dashboard) - PASSED
Backend: Get managers list (GET /api/auth/business/managers) - PASSED
Backend: Admin login with PIN (POST /api/auth/business/manager-login) - PASSED
Backend: Admin login with wrong PIN returns 401 - PASSED
Backend: Permissions structure has all 15 new permissions - PASSED
Backend: Update permissions as owner (PUT /api/businesses/my/workers/{id}/manager/permissions) - PASSED
Backend: Update 4 visibility permissions - PASSED
Backend: Update 4 profile editing permissions - PASSED
Backend: Admin dashboard access - PASSED
Frontend: Owner sees all 7 tabs (Agenda, Servicios, Equipo, Cierres, Fotos, Suscripcion, Actividad) - PASSED
Frontend: Owner sees all 4 stats cards (Citas hoy, Confirmadas, Ingresos mes, Total citas) - PASSED
Frontend: Owner sees Config button - PASSED
Frontend: Permissions modal shows 5 groups (Secciones visibles, Acciones en citas, Clientes, Perfil del negocio, Negocio) - PASSED
Frontend: Admin sees manager session banner - PASSED
Frontend: Admin with view_team=false does NOT see Equipo tab - PASSED
Frontend: Admin with edit_photos=false does NOT see Fotos tab - PASSED
Frontend: Admin with view_reports=false does NOT see revenue/total stats cards - PASSED
Frontend: Admin with all edit_*=false does NOT see Config button - PASSED
Frontend: Save permissions via UI persists correctly - PASSED
Frontend: Success toast 'Permisos actualizados' appears after save - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: DEFAULT_MANAGER_PERMISSIONS correctly defines 15 permissions (removed edit_profile, added 8 new ones)
hasPermission() in auth.js correctly returns true for non-managers (owners have all permissions)
Tab visibility logic in BusinessDashboardPage.jsx correctly filters tabs based on permissions
Stats cards correctly filter based on view_today_bookings, view_confirmed_bookings, view_reports permissions
Config button visibility correctly checks for edit_description, edit_schedule, edit_contact, edit_photos, block_clients
PERMISSION_GROUPS correctly organizes 15 permissions into 5 groups for the modal UI
Manager login returns permissions in response for frontend to use
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test worker 'Test Worker Duration' as administrator.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin permissions feature is fully implemented and tested. Key points: (1) 15 permissions total - 7 original + 8 new (4 visibility + 4 profile editing), (2) edit_profile was replaced by 4 granular permissions but may still exist in old workers' data, (3) Owner hasPermission() always returns true, (4) Manager hasPermission() checks user.manager_permissions[key], (5) Tab visibility controlled by: view_agenda→Agenda, edit_services→Servicios, view_team→Equipo, edit_photos→Fotos, (6) Stats cards controlled by: view_today_bookings, view_confirmed_bookings, view_reports, (7) Config button visible if any of: edit_description, edit_schedule, edit_contact, edit_photos, block_clients is true.
